title: Vue.js 3 Component Teleportation Tutorial | KoderHQ
body: Vue.js 3 Component Teleportation Tutorial ... The Vue team introduced a new feature in the Vue 3 core library called component teleporting .

title: Vue Teleport Guide with Examples | Vue.js 3
body: Vue Teleport is a built-in feature in Vue 3 that allows you to render a part of a component’s template in a different location in the DOM tree. This is achieved using a special component.
